findings.message: `APP_WIDGET_API_URL` is interpolated as `${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}` in base.yml but is not declared in `.env.example`. An undeclared interpolation variable breaks env-var parity: Compose resolves it to an empty string (with a warning) in every environment that composes base.yml, and there is no authoritative declaration documenting the variable for dev/CI/stage/prod operators.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_API_URL=` (with a dev default value or an empty placeholder) to `.env.example` so the variable is declared on the managed environment surface, matching the `${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}` interpolation in infra/compose/base.yml.
